name: Industrial
cardText: Ports, logistics yards and heavy sites where people and machines share space with poor visibility.

meta.title: Industrial
meta.description: Viziblezone for industrial safety: protect workers around heavy machinery in ports, logistics yards and construction sites, beyond line of sight.

hero.title:
Man and machine,
mutually aware
hero.lede: Containers, stacks and structures make industrial sites a maze of blind corners. Viziblezone makes every worker visible to every machine operator — through the obstacles.

scenario.title:
Behind the
container stack
paragraphs: A reach stacker swings around a corner as a worker steps out from behind a container row. Mirrors, cameras and spotters all failed at the same moment, because they all depend on the same thing: a clear line of sight.

With Viziblezone, the worker's device and the machine are directly aware of each other. The operator receives a proximity alert with direction and closing speed while the worker is still hidden — and the worker's device can warn them symmetrically.

items.title: Proximity alerts through obstacles
items.text: Operators are warned about hidden workers with direction and urgency — not a generic beep, a specific risk.

items.title: Both sides warned
items.text: Workers are alerted about approaching machinery they cannot see or hear, especially with hearing protection on.

items.title: Auditable safety layer
items.text: Anonymized encounter logs give HSE teams hard data on near misses, hotspots and shift patterns.

items.title: Days, not months
items.text: Devices carried by workers and mounted in cabins — no site-wide infrastructure installation.

deployment.title:
Fits the site
you already run
paragraphs: Deployment uses ruggedized or standard smartphones carried by workers and devices mounted in machine cabins. Zones, roles and alert thresholds are configured per site, and the system operates fully inside the perimeter — including areas with no coverage at all.
bullets: Worker devices: carried smartphones or wearable-mounted units
Machinery: cabin-mounted device or integration with onboard systems
Works in coverage dead zones: warehouses, holds, underground levels

cta.title:
Make your site
aware
cta.lede: We run scoped industrial pilots with defined safety KPIs.
